victim.value: Raffles Haw, wealthy recluse with mysterious chemical operations who dies of apparent broken heart
victim.quote: Was it suicide, sir? Was it suicide? No, he answered; I think it was a broken heart.

closed_world.value: The New Hall estate where Raffles Haw conducts secret experiments in isolation
closed_world.quote: it was one of his whims that no one should ever cross the threshold of that outlying building

resolution.value: Death appears natural - broken heart - with no criminal investigation or solution provided
resolution.quote: I think it was a broken heart.

investigator.value: Robert McIntyre, artist and acquaintance who discovers the body and explains the death
investigator.quote: Was it suicide, sir? Was it suicide? broke in the policeman as Robert put the note in his pocket

red_herring.value: Initial suggestion that Raffles Haw's mysterious laboratory work and secretive chemical experiments are sinister, when they are actually alchemical gold creation
red_herring.quote: it was one of his whims that no one...should ever cross the threshold of that outlying building

clue_fairness.value: Haw's physical exhaustion after laboratory sessions and the machinery sounds are presented to reader before the gold-making secret is revealed
clue_fairness.quote: Day after day he vanished into it, to reappear hours afterwards pale and exhausted

social_world.value: Victorian class structure where sudden wealth disrupts established hierarchies - the McIntyres' genteel poverty versus Haw's mysterious fortune
social_world.quote: It is from Lady Morsley, asking me to the Lord-Lieutenant's ball. I cannot possibly accept

reveal_mechanic.value: The chemical demonstration of gold creation through Haw's unorthodox alchemical methods in his private laboratory
reveal_mechanic.quote: teach you something of my chemical methods, which I may say differ considerably from those of the orthodox school

media_and_audience.value: Village gossip and local speculation about the mysterious wealthy newcomer and the eventual transformation of his estate into a commercial establishment
media_and_audience.quote: So runs the gossip of the village, and in small places such gossip is seldom wrong

investigator_wound.value: Robert McIntyre becomes obsessed with rediscovering Haw's lost alchemical secret, abandoning his art and becoming 'moody and irritable'
investigator_wound.quote: Robert McIntyre is a moody and irritable man, for ever pursuing a quest which will always evade him

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the doings of raffles haw
